title: a thaumaturge dream
description:
welcome to a thaumaturge dream its a thaumcraft 6 centered modpack with addon its has other magic and tech mod like mekanism botania etc its basically a kitchen sink but has a lot of thaumcraft 6 addon
image made by Chase98 
https://bdcraft.net/community/v
body:
welcome to a thaumataurge dream a modpack where you either make wonderful advencement and great invention or condemned the world to eternal taint this is a thaumcraft centered modpack with extra tech and magic mods to help you automate and keep you engaged this my first verson so if you encounter any probleme or have suggestion leave a comment 
here some of the mods i add :

2. thaumcraft + alot of addons 
3. botania 
4. astral sorccery 
blood magic

3. thermal seires
4.  mekanism
5. industrial forgoing 
6. envremental tech +addon 
 and more 
7. some mods been used :
8. [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft)
8. [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles)
9. [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/astral-sorcery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/astral-sorcery)
